## Summary

- What changed?
- Why this change?

## Branch & Scope

- [ ] This PR comes from a dedicated feature/fix branch (not `main`)
- [ ] Scope is focused and intentionally limited

## Clean Code Checklist

- [ ] Naming is explicit and intention-revealing
- [ ] Logic is simple and avoids unnecessary complexity
- [ ] Error handling is explicit (no silent failures)
- [ ] Existing patterns/conventions are followed

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant checks/tests were executed
- [ ] No unrelated changes were bundled

## Reviewer Gate (Required)

- [ ] Snape reviewed this PR critically
- [ ] Critical findings were addressed or explicitly resolved
